feat.name: Suspect of Opportunity
feat.text: Sometimes something intrudes upon your case unexpectedly, such as an ambush sent to bring your investigation to a close. You use Person of Interest against the triggering creature. This doesn't allow you to use Person of Interest more frequently than normal.

traits.name: Investigator
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the investigator class.

feat.trigger: A creature who isn’t, to your knowledge, tied to any of your active investigations takes a hostile action against you in combat.
